name: Info Card
description: A versatile information card supporting multiple densities and media layouts.

guidelines.purpose: Info Card is a highly flexible component designed for various information densities and media combinations. It provides 9 layout variations based on detail (low/medium/high), media (icon/thumbnail/none), and action (none/button).

variants.media: icon (weather/status), thumbnail (var(--sizing-2400) or calc(var(--sizing-100) * 22) notification/product), none.

anatomy.base: ic class. White bg, border var(--color-border-tertiary), radius var(--sizing-400), padding var(--sizing-400), gap var(--sizing-300).

buttons.primary: AI gradient background, var(--sizing-1100) height, var(--border-radius-full) radius.
buttons.secondary: Outline style, var(--sizing-1100) height, var(--border-radius-full) radius.
